title: Reminder dependent on the date set
excerpt: It would be nice to have an automation that depends on the date set for an item and send the reminder after specified period of time since the date set . For example. We got a new member of our ecosystem and we put a dat…

posts.author: Andrei (Andrei Dratov)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to have an automation that depends on the date set for an item and send the reminder after specified period of time since the date set . For example. We got a new member of our ecosystem and we put a date in a specific column “Member since” and we want to congratulate it when some amount of time passes. For instance, 1 month, 6 months and in 1 year, and after that every year. There is no such automation currently. That would be really cool!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Andrei,

Is this along the lines of what you’re looking for?

Screen Shot 2023-06-13 at 12.58.57 pm1102×656 39 KB

If so, you can configure this via the custom automations feature Let me know!

posts.author: Andrei (Andrei Dratov)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, Bianca! Yes, that is what I was looking for, thank you!
